mapper.select: SELECT so.shipment_order_id, so.shipment_order_code, so.po_id, po.po_code, so.shipment_issue_date, so.client_id, so.manager_id, so.shipment_status, so.shipment_due_date, so.shipment_client_name, so.shipment_country, so.shipment_manager_name, so.shipment_item_name, so.shipment_linked_documents, so.created_at, so.updated_at FROM shipment_orders so JOIN purchase_orders po ON so.po_id = po.po_id WHERE so.shipment_order_code = #{shipmentOrderId}

SELECT so.shipment_order_id, so.shipment_order_code, so.po_id, po.po_code, so.shipment_issue_date, so.client_id, so.manager_id, so.shipment_status, so.shipment_due_date, so.shipment_client_name, so.shipment_country, so.shipment_manager_name, so.shipment_item_name, so.shipment_linked_documents, so.created_at, so.updated_at FROM shipment_orders so JOIN purchase_orders po ON so.po_id = po.po_id ORDER BY so.shipment_order_id

SELECT so.shipment_order_id, so.shipment_order_code, so.po_id, po.po_code, so.shipment_issue_date, so.client_id, so.manager_id, so.shipment_status, so.shipment_due_date, so.shipment_client_name, so.shipment_country, so.shipment_manager_name, so.shipment_item_name, so.shipment_linked_documents, so.created_at, so.updated_at FROM shipment_orders so JOIN purchase_orders po ON so.po_id = po.po_id ORDER BY so.shipment_order_id LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM shipment_orders so JOIN purchase_orders po ON so.po_id = po.po_id
